org.siprop.v2.core.messge
Interface MessageContext

All Superinterfaces:
Context, java.io.Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
MessageContextImpl
public interface MessageContext
extends Context

This interface is Context used for routing.

Author:
noritsuna
